name: file-manager
description: 全栈文件管理系统 - Vue3 + Node.js

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.package: npm run build && tar -czf file-manager.tar.gz --exclude='backend/node_modules' --exclude='src' --exclude='uploads' --exclude='tsconfig.json' --exclude='REFACTOR.md' --exclude='.eslintignore' --exclude='.eslintrc.json' backend/
scripts.install:all: npm install --registry https://registry.npmmirror.com/ && cd frontend && npm install --registry https://registry.npmmirror.com/ && cd ../backend && npm install --registry https://registry.npmmirror.com/
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:check: npm run lint:check:frontend && npm run lint:check:backend
